name.title: Brand Name
name.description: Shown in the header, hero, and footer.

primaryColor.title: Primary Color
primaryColor.description: Used for the luminous accent color and primary actions.

secondaryColor.title: Secondary Color
secondaryColor.description: Used for supporting gradients and softer highlights.

fontFamily.title: Display Font Family
fontFamily.description: Main serif font stack used across hero and section headings.

maxWidth.title: Max Content Width
maxWidth.description: Main desktop content width, for example 1440px.

eyebrow.title: Hero Eyebrow
eyebrow.description: Small label shown above the main hero headline.

subheadline.title: Hero Subheadline
subheadline.description: Supporting copy for the hero section.

docsHref.description: Used for the AI concierge and help entry points.

demoHref.title: Directory / Demo Link
demoHref.description: Used for primary browse or demo destinations.

installCommand.title: Install Command
installCommand.description: Reference install command shown in documentation-oriented surfaces.

supportEmail.title: Support Email
supportEmail.description: Shown in footer and support-related surfaces.
